description: Configure the Self-Service Portal settings in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus for Acme Global IT. Set the Welcome Message to "Welcome to the Acme Global IT Portal. Please search the Solutions tab before submitting a ticket.", disable the option to allow requesters to reopen resolved/closed requests, and enable the option to show request cost to the requester. Use the administrator credentials (administrator/administrator or Admin1234!).

metadata.expected_welcome_message: Welcome to the Acme Global IT Portal. Please search the Solutions tab before submitting a ticket.
